The '''ANv-9q Sensor Array''' was manufactured by [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]]. It was the primary [[Sensor array/Legends|sensor array]] installed [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil's]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]].<ref name="EGVV" /> The ANv-9q was equipped with a [[PH-5s Phased Tachyon Detection Array]] and a [[PK-8f Primary Threat Analysis Grid]].<ref name="SC">{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}}</ref>
